case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 60-150s checkoutservice metrics/traces. Latency.p90 dev=+1.9, latency.p50 dev=+1.6, and internal trace latency.p99 dev=+3.1 confirm checkoutservice latency as root cause. Frontend-to-checkoutservice latency spikes support propagation.
